evals.prompt: Create a script that clones an object's material and changes its 'baseColor' to blue at runtime.
evals.expected_output: A script using component.mainMaterial.clone() and modifying the cloned instance.
expectations: Uses Component.RenderMeshVisual to access the material
Calls visual.mainMaterial.clone() to avoid modifying the asset
Assigns the clone back to visual.mainMaterial

evals.prompt: Implement a logic that cycles a shader's 'Offset' float parameter between 0 and 1 every frame.
evals.expected_output: An UpdateEvent modifying a shader pass parameter.
expectations: Uses Math.sin or similar to cycle the value
Correctly identifies the property name as defined in the Material Editor
